description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a modern facade dominated by horizontal bands of blue-tinted glass and light gray concrete or metal panels. The structure features a repetitive window pattern across all floors, giving it a sleek and uniform appearance. The base of the building is slightly wider and includes a commercial frontage with large glass panels, likely for retail or lobby space. One side of the building displays a prominent vertical architectural element, possibly a decorative column or service core, which adds visual interest to the otherwise regular exterior. The roof appears flat and may house mechanical equipment or a rooftop terrace. The overall design is functional and typical of high-rise office towers found in dense urban environments.
description: A modern, high-rise office building with blue-tinted glass bands and light gray paneling, featuring a flat roof and a prominent vertical accent on one side.
description_view_0: Shows the building's corner with horizontal blue glass bands and a commercial base with visible entryways.
description_view_1: Highlights the uniform window pattern and the commercial frontage at the base, with less emphasis on the vertical accent.
description_view_2: Displays the prominent vertical architectural feature running up the facade, breaking the regular window pattern.
description_view_3: Similar to view 2, emphasizing the vertical accent and the glassy commercial base.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, horizontal bands of rectangular windows evenly spaced across all floors, with consistent repetition and alignment.
